questions.text: The most abundant protein in animals is:
questions.explanation: Collagen is the most abundant protein in the animal kingdom, found in connective tissues.
Enzymes are biological catalysts that speed up biochemical reactions without being consumed.
Glucose (C6H12O6) is a monosaccharide - the simplest form of carbohydrate.

questions.correctAnswer: Amino acids are the building blocks of proteins, containing an amino group, carboxyl group, and side chain.
questions.explanation: There are 20 standard amino acids that form proteins through peptide bonds.
